Bash(.venv/bin/python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0,''.''\); from app.db import get_db; conn = get_db\(\); print\(''team_boxscores cols:'', [d[1] for d in conn.execute\(''PRAGMA table_info\(team_boxscores\)''\).fetchall\(\)]\); print\(''player_boxscores cols:'', [d[1] for d in conn.execute\(''PRAGMA table_info\(player_boxscores\)''\).fetchall\(\)]\); print\(''games cols:'', [d[1] for d in conn.execute\(''PRAGMA table_info\(games\)''\).fetchall\(\)]\); rows = conn.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM player_boxscores''\).fetchone\(\)[0]; print\(''player_boxscores rows:'', rows\); sample = conn.execute\(''SELECT * FROM player_boxscores LIMIT 2''\).fetchall\(\); print\(''sample player rows:'', [dict\(r\) for r in sample]\)")
